'''Nort Fandi''' was a shuttle pilot who lived onboard the ''[[BioCruiser]]''. A tall, balding [[Human/Legends|Human]], he transported [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hilo]] to the ''Biocruiser'' so that they could investigate it.

{{Char-stub}}
